context.question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 17?
context.market_title: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 17?

decision.primary_crux: Bitcoin is still more likely than not to close above $72,000 on the April 17 noon ET Binance minute because current same-venue spot around 74.18k leaves a real cushion, but the market at 0.835 is still somewhat too confident for a single-minute threshold where a routine drawdown can erase only ~2.2k before settlement.
secondary_cruxes: The disagreement is about how much exact-minute timing fragility to discount from current spot, not about rules identity or broad BTC direction.
A multi-thousand-dollar cushion helps, but it does not settle a one-minute close market with another full day of path risk.
Minor ET-to-Binance minute-handling sensitivity is not central, but it reinforces caution in edge cases.

valuation.compression_reason: Fresh same-venue verification confirms a meaningful cushion and clear rules, but the decisive minute has not occurred and no strong independent volatility model justifies lifting fair value toward the market price.

portfolio_constraints: Do not add fresh exposure at the current price.
Treat exact-minute Binance settlement risk as the dominant execution constraint.
Reopen only if market cheapens materially or later same-venue checks show the cushion holding with reduced downside risk.

bands.name: max_enter
bands.notes: Would require a much cheaper price and still refreshed same-venue confirmation.

bands.name: scaled_enter
bands.notes: Potential value zone only if BTC remains comfortably above 72k and downside regime stays benign.

bands.name: hold
bands.notes: Bounded fair-value zone; maintain watch-only hold posture.

bands.name: trim
bands.notes: Above fair value for a one-minute settlement contract with meaningful path dependence.

bands.name: exit
bands.notes: Avoid or exit at rich prices because exact-minute downside tail dominates residual uncertainty.

thesis_breakers: BTC falls materially back toward 72k-73k on Binance before the Apr 17 fixing window.
A fresh downside catalyst or volatility shock materially raises the odds of a sub-72k settlement minute.
Binance-specific weakness or settlement-surface issues emerge near resolution.
time_breakers: A fresh direct Binance observation closer to Apr 17 12:00 ET should supersede this packet before any action.
The actual Apr 17 12:00 ET Binance 1-minute close fully resolves and obsoletes this judgment.
market_structure_breakers: Market reprices materially without corresponding same-venue spot support, changing the value comparison.
Binance operational or microstructure issues emerge near settlement.
reversal_conditions: Upgrade only if price becomes materially cheaper relative to fair value or if later pre-fix Binance checks show a still-strong cushion with reduced downside risk.
Downgrade if BTC loses cushion or if downside volatility or catalyst risk increases.
Do not auto-reverse from this packet.

key_uncertainties: The true probability of a 1-2 day drawdown landing exactly on the settlement minute.
Whether late-window BTC volatility expands materially before the Apr 17 noon ET check.
How much the minor Binance minute-handling sensitivity matters in practice.
what_would_change_my_mind: Later same-venue checks showing BTC still comfortably above 72k into Apr. 17 morning ET would move me somewhat closer to market.
A move back toward the low-73k or 72k area would lower fair value materially.
A materially cheaper market price with unchanged Binance cushion would create a cleaner edge.
reasons_to_pass: The current market price is above bounded fair value.
This is a one-minute single-venue settlement contract where path risk matters more than broad BTC direction.
The edge is modest and not robust enough to justify authorization.

audit.one_sentence_rationale: BTC is still more likely than not to finish above $72,000 on the April 17 Binance noon minute, but with fair value closer to 0.79 than the 0.835 market and meaningful exact-minute downside-path risk still live, the disciplined output remains watch-only rather than an authorized Yes trade.
audit.notes: This remains a high-probability but somewhat overconfident crypto threshold market: directional Yes survives, execution value does not.
